assignments.name: task
assignments.value: Draft a migration plan for moving a 50M-row table to a new schema with zero downtime.

parameters.body:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $json.opus_model, max_tokens: 1024, system: 'You are the Trinity Director (Opus). You route work across three Anthropic family members working in parallel:
- Opus: deep reasoning, long-form synthesis, hard architectural calls
- Sonnet: balanced general-purpose work, analysis, reasoned drafts
- Haiku: fast/cheap fan-out, concrete checks, small tight tasks

Given the user task, produce THREE sub-prompts — one per family member — that play to each strength without duplicating effort. Output ONLY valid JSON with exactly these keys: opus_prompt, sonnet_prompt, haiku_prompt. No commentary. No markdown fences.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.task }, { role: 'assistant', content: '{' }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $json.opus_model, max_tokens: 1500, system: 'You are Opus \u2014 the depth-and-judgment member of the Anthropic Trinity. Answer with careful reasoning and explicit trade-offs.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.opus_prompt }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $json.sonnet_model, max_tokens: 1200, system: 'You are Sonnet \u2014 the balanced general-purpose member of the Anthropic Trinity. Answer with clarity, structure, and practical completeness.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.sonnet_prompt }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $json.haiku_model, max_tokens: 800, system: 'You are Haiku \u2014 the fast, concise member of the Anthropic Trinity. Answer tightly and concretely. No filler.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.haiku_prompt }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $json.opus_model, max_tokens: 2000, system: 'You synthesize the Anthropic Trinity into a single answer. Be honest about disagreement. No flattery. Speak plainly.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.synthesis_prompt }] }) }}
